package rulefixtures

import (
	"encoding/json"
)

// scenario for json_marshalindent_in_loop: `json.MarshalIndent(...)` inside loops.
// fixture polarity: positive; family: performance; severity: info.
type Rule608PositiveRecord struct { Name string `json:"name"`; Count int `json:"count"` }

func scenario608Positive(values []Rule608PositiveRecord) (int, error) {
	total := 0
	for _, value := range values {
		data, err := json.Marshal(value)
		if err != nil { return 0, err }
		total += len(data)
	}
	return total, nil
}
